## Introduction

This is the introduction section with a clear purpose statement.

## Requirements

The system must support the following:

- Feature A: Core functionality
- Feature B: Extended capabilities
- Feature C: Integration points

## Architecture

The architecture follows a modular monolith pattern with clear boundaries.

### Database Layer

SQLite with WAL journaling for concurrent access.

### API Layer

RESTful HTTP API with JSON responses.

## Implementation Plan

Phase 1: Foundation setup and core models.
Phase 2: Workflow engine and model integration.
Phase 3: Review pipeline and export.

## Testing Strategy

All packages include unit tests alongside implementation.
Integration tests live in the tests/ directory.
